name: OCR-triggered door unlock
tagline: 🔤 Read a plate or badge → unlock the door + log the match to Helix.
description: Read text, signage, license plates, or a badge/ID held up to a camera with Gemini, and unlock a door when the OCR'd text matches a target string (a VIP plate, vendor name, employee badge code, etc.). Analyzes a short video clip rather than a single frame, so a quickly-flashed ID still gets caught. Every match also gets logged to Helix as an OCR Match event so you have an audit trail of who/what got let in.
summary: Motion webhook → Gemini OCR on a short clip (JSON) → condition → unlock door → Helix log of what + why
